title: Draft Confidence Model & Governance Gate — implement first, dogfood during E5
definition_of_done: decompose-apply creates draft nodes; draft nodes excluded from ready queue; dag-summary interactive sign-off promotes draft to verified; make check green
scope: internal/ops/types.go, internal/materialize/materialize.go, internal/ready/compute.go, internal/decompose/apply.go, internal/tui/dagsummary/model.go, cmd/trellis/dag_summary.go, cmd/trellis/main_test.go
outcome: Full draft confidence model implemented: confidence field in ops/materialize, draft gate in ready queue, dag-transition op for subtree promotion, dag-summary BubbleTea TUI for per-item sign-off, decompose-apply emits draft on all created nodes
